title: Forging Mastery
summary: Forging now branches between durable practical craft and high-performance smith work, making progression choices legible for future recipe unlock presentation.

thresholds.title: Grandmaster Forge
thresholds.description: Late thresholds support a defining smithing identity.

nodes.title: Foundry Canon
nodes.description: The opener claims every true smith begins by mastering heat before shaping ambition.

nodes.title: Balanced Edge
nodes.description: Weaponsmith records insist a blade must strike true before it strikes hard.

nodes.title: Rivet Oath
nodes.description: Armorsmith notes praise joins that hold under panic, mud, and siege alike.

nodes.title: Temper Line
nodes.description: This chapter tracks the heat at which steel remembers violence without becoming brittle.

nodes.title: Layered Guard
nodes.description: The armorsmith folio details plate orderings that redirect force into harmless echoes.

nodes.title: Joint Discipline
nodes.description: At center, the text unites killing edge and patient guard into one smith's ethic.

nodes.title: Kingsteel Temper
nodes.description: Inner weapon pages speak of a temper that keeps bite after endless campaigns.

nodes.title: Helmsplitter Pattern
nodes.description: The outer route details profile shapes built to ruin armor at first contact.

nodes.title: Bastion Skin
nodes.description: Inner armor leaves map cuirass forms that endure where others buckle and split.

nodes.title: Vigil Plate
nodes.description: The outer armorer script details layered helm and greave sets for relentless defense.

nodes.title: Crimson Edict
nodes.description: Hidden marginalia names a weapon line forged for decisive wars and no half-measures.

nodes.title: Immortal Harness
nodes.description: A hidden armorer appendix claims this harness lets its bearer outlast impossible sieges.
